description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a prominent gable roof and a spacious front yard lined with evenly spaced trees. The structure features a main house with an attached garage and a driveway leading directly to a wide street. The roof is primarily gray with some red accent sections, and the exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted siding. The property includes a paved walkway and a driveway, as well as a detached structure and additional paved areas, possibly patios or auxiliary buildings. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, and a covered porch is visible at the entrance.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, and a tree-lined yard facing a wide street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and symmetrical tree-lined yard facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, driveway, and auxiliary structures behind the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, detached structures, and the full width of the property including the street and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional paved areas, and the arrangement of trees along the driveway.
